mechanism: Fiscal spending at 6-7% deficit/GDP simultaneously sustains equity earnings (suppressing VIX via 8-10% EPS growth) and requires $2T+ annual Treasury issuance (elevating MOVE via supply uncertainty and term premium repricing), directly producing the MOVE-VIX divergence.
regime_dependence: Holds as long as fiscal deficit remains elevated (>5% of GDP) without consolidation or crisis. Breaks if fiscal consolidation occurs (equity vol rises, rates vol falls) or fiscal crisis materializes (both spike).
